+import timm

@@ -39,16 +39,18 @@
     

     device = torch.device('cuda' if torch.cuda.is_available() else 'cpu')

     

-    model = models.resnet50(weights=None)

-    model.fc = nn.Linear(model.fc.in_features, 10)

+    model = timm.create_model('vit_base_patch16_clip_224.openai', pretrained=False, num_classes=10)

     model.load_state_dict(torch.load(args.checkpoint, map_location=device))

     model.to(device)

     model.eval()

     

+    mean = [0.48145466, 0.4578275, 0.40821073]

+    std = [0.26862954, 0.26130258, 0.27577711]

+    

     transform = transforms.Compose([

         transforms.Resize((224, 224)),

         transforms.ToTensor(),

-        transforms.Normalize(mean=[0.485, 0.456, 0.406], std=[0.229, 0.224, 0.225])

+        transforms.Normalize(mean=mean, std=std)

     ])

     

     dataset = TestDataset(args.data_path, 'test.txt', transform=transform)

@@ -50,17 +50,23 @@
     

     device = torch.device('cuda' if torch.cuda.is_available() else 'cpu')

     

+    # CLIP normalization

+    mean = [0.48145466, 0.4578275, 0.40821073]

+    std = [0.26862954, 0.26130258, 0.27577711]

+    

     train_transform = transforms.Compose([

         transforms.Resize((224, 224)),

         transforms.RandomHorizontalFlip(),

+        transforms.ColorJitter(brightness=0.2, contrast=0.2, saturation=0.2, hue=0.1),

+        transforms.RandomAffine(degrees=15, translate=(0.1, 0.1), scale=(0.9, 1.1)),

         transforms.ToTensor(),

-        transforms.Normalize(mean=[0.485, 0.456, 0.406], std=[0.229, 0.224, 0.225])

+        transforms.Normalize(mean=mean, std=std)

     ])

     

     val_transform = transforms.Compose([

         transforms.Resize((224, 224)),

         transforms.ToTensor(),

-        transforms.Normalize(mean=[0.485, 0.456, 0.406], std=[0.229, 0.224, 0.225])

+        transforms.Normalize(mean=mean, std=std)

     ])

     

     train_dataset = WildlifeDataset(args.data_dir, 'train.txt', transform=train_transform)
